title: stone recipes
description: Datapack adds recipes from all types of stone, for recipes in which only cobblestone or stone can be used
body:
You've probably had a situation more than once where you wanted a craft observer, dropper, etc., but didn't have a cobblestone with you, but full chests of stone, diorite, andesite?


This datapack was created to solve this age-old problem and allow you to use any stone instead of cobblestone or stone


** To import the datapack without modrinth app, unzip “Stone recipes.zip”, copy the “stone_recipes” folder and paste it into 
"%appdata%\Roaming\.minecraft\saves\<your_world>\datapacks"**
